const resolveData = $('Resolve URL').first().json;
return [{ json: { run_id: resolveData.run_id, org_id: resolveData.org_id, org_name: resolveData.org_name, enrichment: {}, signals: [], signal_count: 0, crawl_skipped: true, skip_reason: resolveData.skip_reason || 'No website URL', crawl_error: null } }];
